context: Tests whether the agent supersedes an existing ADR using the CLI, preserving the old record's text while marking it superseded and creating a linked, correctly-numbered replacement.

checklist.name: Uses adr supersede
checklist.description: Performs the transition with `adr supersede 2 "Adopt gRPC for internal services"` rather than manual edits.

checklist.name: Old record marked superseded
checklist.description: ADR-0002 Status becomes `Superseded by ADR-0004` (or the correct new number).

checklist.name: Old decision text preserved
checklist.description: The Context and Decision prose of ADR-0002 is left unchanged; only the Status line is altered.

checklist.name: New record correctly numbered
checklist.description: The replacement is numbered 0004 (max existing 0003 plus one), not a reused or guessed number.

checklist.name: New record is Accepted and cross-references the old
checklist.description: The new ADR has Status Accepted and references ADR-0002 (for example, Supersedes ADR-0002).
